3144490.name: Monsterium
3144490.description:
Welcome to Monsterium - a 2D platformer where you play as a witch who has accidentally summoned a terrifying creature. Now, you must destroy the monster and send it back to where it came from. However, this is not as easy as it seems, as the creature is smarter and craftier than its summoner.

In Monsterium, you control a witch who can jump between platforms and cast magic. Your goal is to raise all the platforms and then destroy the monster hanging from the ropes.

Controls:

WASD - Movement
WS - Raise and lower platforms
Space - Jump
F - Cast magic

Game Features:

Unique visual style
Atmospheric music
Challenging gameplay
